chief_complaint: A 32-year-old man presented to the ED following loss of consciousness. He was newly diagnosed with type 1 diabetes mellitus.
history: The patient had a new diagnosis of type 1 diabetes mellitus and presented with loss of consciousness, putting him in a high-risk physiologic state due to diabetic ketoacidosis.
exam: No specific vital signs or physical examination findings are provided.
labs: No specific investigations or results are provided, but radiologic progression of the disease correlated well with the patient's clinical picture.
